name: Invoice: Create Invoice

description.en: Generate a professional PDF invoice from line items. Provide titles, quantities, and unit prices to create a downloadable invoice document stored in your team library.
description.de: Erstelle eine professionelle PDF-Rechnung aus Einzelposten. Gib Titel, Mengen und Einzelpreise an, um ein herunterladbares Rechnungsdokument in deiner Team-Bibliothek zu erzeugen.

bot: Use this when the user wants to create, generate, or issue an invoice, bill, or payment request with specific line items. Extract line items from the conversation context.

inputs.name: Line Items

description.en: Array of line items. Each item needs a title, quantity, and unitPrice in cents.
description.de: Array von Einzelposten. Jeder Posten braucht einen Titel, eine Menge und einen Einzelpreis in Cent.

inputs.bot: Array of objects: [{ title, quantity, unitPrice }]. unitPrice is in cents (e.g. 5000 for 50.00). Extract from the user's description of work and materials.

inputs.name: Notes

description.en: Optional notes or terms to include on the invoice.
description.de: Optionale Notizen oder Bedingungen, die auf der Rechnung erscheinen sollen.

inputs.bot: Optional. Payment terms, delivery notes, or any text to append to the invoice.

inputs.name: Buyer Name

description.en: Name of the customer or company being billed.
description.de: Name des Kunden oder Unternehmens, das berechnet wird.

inputs.bot: Optional. The recipient's name or company. If omitted, uses the authenticated user's name.

inputs.name: Buyer Address

description.en: Address of the customer being billed.
description.de: Adresse des Kunden, der berechnet wird.

inputs.bot: Optional. The recipient's address. Only needed if different from the contact on file.
